headline: Can Texas Instruments' Analog Unit Extend Its Strong Sales Growth Run?
summary: TXN's analog unit rebounds with Q1 revenues rising 22% to $3.92B as industrial strength and AI data center demand lift the 2026 outlook.

headline: AI Gold Rush Goes Public - Cerebras Storms Nasdaq as Cisco Rewrites the Rulebook
